name: Launch Decision Cluster
description: Coordinates deployment risk and public API design judgment.

domains.load_condition: Task involves a deploy, rollback, production change, deployment, or release decision.
Task introduces or modifies a public API surface, endpoint, request, or response contract.
domains.contribution_hypothesis_template: Public API compatibility adds a distinct contract-design dimension beyond deployment risk.

domains.load_condition: Task involves monitoring, observability, missing failure signals, or silent production errors.
domains.contribution_hypothesis_template: Observability adds a distinct failure-detection dimension beyond deployment risk.
